runners.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 3rd on April 12 over 320m at Richmond behind Golden Blend beaten 2.25 lengths (18.36) in a Grade 5. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 3rd on April 12 over 320m at Richmond behind Golden Blend beaten 2.25 lengths (18.36) in a Grade 5. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together several times in the run to the first turn and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by a nose at Goulburn over 350m (20.10) beating Monsoon Ethics in Grade 5 on April 10. In winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by a nose at Goulburn over 350m (20.10) beating Monsoon Ethics in Grade 5 on April 10. In winning form and can measure up again.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.64) when fifth over 320m at Richmond in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from 12 starts. Key chance and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (18.64) when fifth over 320m at Richmond in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from 12 starts. Key chance and should go close.

runners.formComment: Returns from a five-and-a-half months break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed over 340m at this track. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a five-and-a-half months break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed over 340m at this track. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Passing the first turn hampered off the heels.
Came together in the turn to the home straight.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 6 lengths at Goulburn. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Tough line-up and place prospects appear best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 6 lengths at Goulburn. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Tough line-up and place prospects appear best.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 622m at Richmond. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 622m at Richmond. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

runners.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Goulburn over 350m. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Goulburn over 350m. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn crowded for room and came together.
Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 19.41, beating Hibiki Blue. Last start finished last over 340m at this track beaten 8 lengths (19.70) behind Gus And Glory in a NG on April 7. Major threat on best form.
